## Tool

Example: Codex, Claude Code, Claude.ai Projects, Cursor, Windsurf, other.

## Operating system

Example: Windows 11, macOS, Linux.

## Install method tried

Paste the command or steps you used.

## Did DPFTS activate?

Yes/no/partial.

## Test prompt used

```text
Use DPFTS. In one short answer, tell me your priority order for Roblox work and name three things you should never trust the client with.
```

## Result

Paste the assistant's answer or describe what happened.

## Notes

Anything confusing, broken, or different from the README?
